description: Load a TDC dataset (single_pred/multi_pred/generation) and write a train/valid/test split via the chosen method (scaffold/random/cold_drug/cold_target).
rules: read-only — loads a curated dataset and partitions it; nothing is mutated remotely
PyTDC downloads the dataset on first use; degrades gracefully (skipped report) when tdc/network is absent
split sizes + columns + a 3-row train sample are written to record_store as split.json
usage: Set TDC_PROBLEM (single_pred|multi_pred|generation), TDC_TASK (e.g. ADME, DTI, MolGen), TDC_DATASET (e.g. Caco2_Wang); optional TDC_METHOD (default scaffold), TDC_SEED (default 42), TDC_FRAC (default 0.7,0.1,0.2). Output: split.json.
limitation: Read-only. Requires the PyTDC package and network access to fetch the dataset; offline it emits a skipped report. Cold splits apply only to multi_pred (DTI/DDI) tasks.
